name: Broiler Almond Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, margarine (or butter), eggs, sliced almonds, and all topping ingredients.
4. Mix until well blended.
5. Spread dough evenly in the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from oven and set aside.
8. In a small saucepan, combine the remaining topping ingredients over low heat.
9. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sugar dissolves.
10. Spread the topping evenly over the baked base.
11. Return to the oven and broil 4 to 6 inches from the heat for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes or until bubbly and lightly browned.
12. Let cool completely before cutting into bars.
Nutrition information per serving (1 bar): 100 calories, 5 grams fat, 9 mg cholesterol, 120 mg sodium.
